---
title: "The Winds of Cathrigg Illustrated by Frances Ewan."
---

## The Winds of Cathrigg Illustrated by Frances Ewan.

**Author:** Christabel Rose Coleridge
**Date:** 1901
**Imprint:** London: Isbister

### Notes

Previously serialized in Isbister\'s <i>Sunday Magazine</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
